title: PowerBytes
description: A PVP mod that adds magical abilities to players
body:
# 👀 Main

Magic mod for pvp and pve.
If you have questions, need help or just want to talk with mod author, join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/KFpPXrJXrZ).

## ✅ Main features:
- Custom combat system: access combat mode with left alt to use custom abilities.
- Leveling system and stats management for health, abilities damage and defense.
- Items that give player new abilities like a chip or a stamp.
- Random technique and stamp when first join the world.
- NPCs that spawn in overworld or in custom structures and have access to custom abilities. By killing them you get xp for leveling.
- Structures with custom boss spawners to farm and progress through.

## 🥳 Trailer
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/15M85Ega7aQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🦾 Techniques
Every technique has a list of its abilities, that allows player to manipulate something.

There are currently 4 techniques: Air, Knife, Probability, Firework.

## 🙏 Stamps
Every stamps gives player one single ability, that allows them to create a sphere of blocks with its own unique effects specific to each stamp.

There is currently 2 stamps: Barrier, Late Flower

# 💻 Modpacks
You can freely use this mod in your modpack. Nothing is required.
